operation: list clients — the firm's full client roster (paged)

query.limit: page size — CAPPED AT 100 server-side regardless of the value sent

body.nextPage: cursor/url string for the next page (offset paging also works)

success.clientObject: { id (clientId, integer), customId (firm's client code), createdAt, name, state, contactFirstName, contactLastName, contactEmail, departmentId, isSensitive, lastLogin, isAssigned }

notes: Enumerate everything by looping offset until offset + len(data) >= totalCount. This response does NOT include each client's engagements — use the getClientInfo gateway (gw_getClientInfo.json) for that.
